label: Transparent beetroot root motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Beetroot transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a beetroot plant motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A fresh beetroot root with a round earthy bulb, tapered root tail, rich beet-purple skin with subtle crimson striations, burgundy stems, leaf-green tops with red-purple veins, and small natural soil-brown texture on the root surface. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, tactile vegetable-root detail, no cut slices.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the whole root, tail, stems, and leaf cluster without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ffff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ffff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no radish, no turnip, no onion, no carrot, no salad, no bowl, no hand, no props, no garden bed, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no second plant species.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Beetroot light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Beetroot", derived from the visible transparent beetroot root cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible rich admin system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, professional UI design-system presentation, clean grid, large readable section labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Beetroot, Beetroot Root, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language only from rich beet-purple root skin, burgundy stems and veins, leaf-green tops, soil-brown root texture, pale beet-flesh highlights, and vegetable-garden earth neutrals. The board must visibly read as beetroot, not radish or turnip.
Typography: English admin UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/destructive buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, texture samples, simple icons, token chips.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product UI for a rich admin system, precise dense layout, 8px radii, beet-paper light background, deep beet-purple primary actions, burgundy active states, leaf-green success/focus accents, soil-brown dividers, subtle root-ring and leaf-vein textures.
Constraints: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif; no unrelated blue/purple gradients, no neon colors, no generic stock UI kit, no radishes, no turnips, no bowls, no garden photography, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Beetroot", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Beetroot dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Beetroot". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible beetroot root cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, professional UI design-system presentation, clean grid, large readable section labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Beetroot, Beetroot Root, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the same beetroot system language: deepest beet-purple and root-shadow backgrounds, burgundy stems and veins, leaf-green success/focus controls, soil-brown borders and dividers, pale beet-flesh text/surfaces, root-ring and leaf-vein textures, 8px radii, dense shadcn/tweakcn admin grid. Must read as beetroot, not radish or turnip.
Typography: English admin UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/destructive buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, texture samples, simple icons, token chips.
Visual details: dark beet-ink canvas, deep plum cards, beet-purple active states, burgundy chart highlights, leaf-green focus rings, soil-brown separators, pale beet-flesh foreground, subtle root rings and leaf-vein texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp admin components.
Constraints: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif; no neon colors, no unrelated bright blues, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no radishes, no turnips, no bowls, no garden photography, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Beetroot", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
